title: Body-Worn Camera / Dashcam Footage – Stolen Semi Truck Pursuit (Aug 25, 2023) – Michael S. Jones

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Wisconsin Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

On August 25, 2023, Wisconsin State Patrol was involved in/assisted with a multi-agency pursuit involving a stolen semi-truck driven by Michael S. Jones, which traveled on I-94 and ended near Wisconsin Dells / Juneau County after deployment of stop sticks and a crash/fire.

I request the full, unedited body-worn camera (BWC) video files for all Wisconsin State Patrol troopers involved (from initial contact through the end of the incident), and the full dashcam/in-car video for all WSP vehicles involved. If available, please also include radio/dispatch audio and any incident/case number used by WSP for this event.

Please provide the records electronically (download link/email). If there are any fees, please provide an estimate before processing. This request is for public interest and informational purposes.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Unseen BodyCam Cases
